scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && rm -rf dist && cp -r frontend/dist dist
scripts.test: concurrently "npm run test --prefix backend" "npm run test --prefix frontend"
scripts.lint: concurrently "npm run lint --prefix backend" "npm run lint --prefix frontend"
